title: THAYER FAMILY FOUNDATION VETERANS SHELTER - 211info
text: THAYER FAMILY FOUNDATION VETERANS SHELTER THAYER FAMILY FOUNDATION VETERANS SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a transitional housing program with 17 beds. Program participants will have their own private room with a restroom, television, microwave, mini-fridge, and coffee pot. Services include case management, recovery support, hot meals, a food pantry, a clothing closet, laundry services, and transit passes. Consent to substance use testing is required for participation in the program. This program may operate on a waitlist. Eligibility: Veterans who are currently experiencing homelessness and in active recovery from substance use disorders Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (503) 278-4417 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 490-0285 Main phone Intake (503) 278-4417 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Transitional Housing/Shelter * Homeless Veterans * Substance Use Disorder Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
